rekordboxDesktop.confirmTrackCountUnknown: Tracks from the current playlist will be written.
rekordboxDesktop.storageDirConfirmLine: Tracks will be copied here first: {path}
rekordboxDesktop.storageDirSetupIntro: Before the first Rekordbox write, choose where the track copies should be stored.
rekordboxDesktop.storageDirSetupWhy: FRKB will copy the tracks for this write into this directory first. Rekordbox will reference those copied files instead of the original FRKB paths.
rekordboxDesktop.storageDirSetupSettingHint: This directory will be remembered and can be changed later in Settings under "Rekordbox track storage directory".
rekordboxDesktop.storageDirSetupPathPlaceholder: Click to choose the directory Rekordbox should reference
rekordboxDesktop.keepSourceQuestion: After the copy is done, should FRKB keep the original tracks?
rekordboxDesktop.deleteSourceFailedTitle: Original track deletion was not fully successful
rekordboxDesktop.deletePlaylistConfirmLine1: The following Rekordbox playlist will be deleted: {name}
rekordboxDesktop.deletePlaylistConfirmLine2: Only the Rekordbox playlist structure will be removed. Track files will be kept.
rekordboxDesktop.deleteFolderConfirmLine1: The following Rekordbox folder will be deleted: {name}
rekordboxDesktop.deleteFolderConfirmLine2: Its child folders and playlists will also be removed, but the track files will be kept.
rekordboxDesktop.deleteFolderDescendants: This folder currently contains {folderCount} child folder(s) and {playlistCount} playlist(s).
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckBusy: Rekordbox appears to be running. Close it and try again.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckUnavailable: No writable Rekordbox desktop library was detected.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckUnknown: The Rekordbox write status could not be confirmed. Try again later.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckUnknownWithReason: The Rekordbox write status could not be confirmed: {message}
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckOpenHint: Opening the target selector has been blocked.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckCreateHint: Creating a Rekordbox folder or empty playlist has been blocked.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckMoveHint: Changing the Rekordbox tree structure has been blocked.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckEditHint: Changing a Rekordbox playlist or folder has been blocked.
rekordboxDesktop.writeCheckWriteHint: The final write action has been blocked.
rekordboxDesktop.successDeletedSourceTracks: Original tracks moved to recycle bin: {count}
rekordboxDesktop.failureLogHint: Open the log from the title-bar menu for more details: {path}
rekordboxDesktop.noTracksToImport: There are no tracks to write into Rekordbox.
rekordboxDesktop.loadTreeFailed: Failed to load the Rekordbox desktop library.
rekordboxDesktop.loadingPlaylistTree: Loading the Rekordbox desktop playlist tree...
rekordboxDesktop.emptyPlaylistTree: There are no visible playlists in this Rekordbox desktop library yet.
rekordboxDesktop.selectPlaylistPrompt: Select a Rekordbox playlist from the left first.
rekordboxDesktop.emptyPlaylist: There are no visible tracks in this Rekordbox playlist yet.
